svg.title: Information path through a transformer via the KV cache
svg.desc: A grid showing the sentence "The lighthouse guided ships through stormy seas" with layers stacked bottom-up and tokens left-to-right. An amber staircase highlights one information path from E1 through each layer's attention to x77. Only the first hop touches a raw embedding; all others read deep features from the previous layer.
svg.text: path: E₁ → x₁¹ → x₂² → x₃³ → x₄⁴ → x₅⁵ → x₆⁶ → x₇⁷ — only E₁ is a raw embedding
